label: 2026-04-17-chilled-lane
description: Current natural clear for the shipped April 17 board. Opens center plus Sunroot, anchors Frost Fern deep in lane 2, then layers Thorn Vine coverage across every lane before a late Bramble Spear reinforces the chilled center ram window. This line should clear the scripted challenge and enter endless on the live Cold Lane scenario.

expect.reason: validator-backed cold-lane clear with deep frost control and late center spear

placements.note: Center thorn opener for the first lane-2 pressure.
Early economy anchor for the later multi-lane thorn flood.
Catch the first upper shard lane.
Catch the first lower shard lane.
Deep lane-2 chill anchor for the sniper-and-ram windows.
Top-lane coverage before the outer pressure stacks.
Protect the Sunroot lane and start building the lower ram answer.
Second center thorn so the chilled lane converts into kills.
Second top thorn for the late outer-lane ram window.
Continue stacking the lower lane for the later ram sequence.
Third lower-lane thorn to finish the lower ram hold.
Late center spear closes the chilled lane safely before the last ram stack.
Top lane depth for the final outer-lane cleanup.
Late upper support as the challenge finishes draining.
Late lower support mirroring the upper side.
Final lower-lane reinforcement right before the natural clear.
Final upper-lane reinforcement right before endless unlocks.
